name: CSY Component Homomorphic Image
description: Every component of a conjunctive system coupling is a homomorphic image of the resultant conjunctive system CSY(VSCR).

elements.text: If SCR is a conjunctive system coupling recipe, Z& = CSY(VSCR), and Z$ ∈ VSCR, then Z$ is a homomorphic image of Z& with respect to PJN(SZ$), PJN(IPZ$), and PJN(OPZ$).
HS = PJN(SZ$) ∈ FNS(SZ&, ONTO, SZ$) by theorem A1.176.
HI = PJN(IPZ$) ∈ FNS(IZ&, ONTO, IZ$) by theorem A1.176.
HO = PJN(OPZ$) ∈ FNS(OZ&, ONTO, OZ$) by theorem A1.176.
Next-state consistency follows from the CSY definition at 3.40.
Readout consistency follows from the CSY definition at 3.40.
